sections.title: Talking to Rimae Sirsalis about the ceremonial clothes

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: Welcome to the clothes store. How might I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know the ceremonial clothes?

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: I certainly do! A real tricky set of garments to make.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that's unfortunate, because I was going to ask you how I might go about getting some.

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: All I can really help you out with is the tanning of the hides.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry?

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: The ceremonial clothes are made from the hides of the Suqah monsters. Bring them to me and I will tan them for you. You can then craft them into the top, trousers, gloves and boots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: It's an interesting creature the Suqah. You see, they have been indigenous to this island since we arrived. They seem to thrive of eating the minerals that exist in the mines below the town. We try our best to live in

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: harmony with them, because they provide us with a great many materials when they die, and in turn we have given them magic to help protect themselves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting.

sections.title: Talking to the Ethereal Being in the Dream World

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Don't you know, you're in the land of your own dreams!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you can't know you're in a dream whilst dreaming, you'd wake up!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Well, this is a waking sleep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. So how do I wake up?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Just use this lectern - it's the book of your life, all that has been, all that is and blank pages for all that will be. In reading this you will return your mind to reality and the conscious world.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This all seems very deep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I supposed to do now?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: That is totally up to you. This is a test, it wouldn't be fair if I gave you the answers now would it? But I can tell you that there is a selection of tasks that you can choose from. I like to call them, 'A game of chance',

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: 'Communicating in numbers', 'Chop, chop, chop away', 'Where am I?', 'The race is on!', and 'Anything you can do...'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is the strangest place I have ever been.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Then you don't know your mind too well, do you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good point.

lines.text: Hi.

lines.text: Have you learnt anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: As previously discussed, I learned the importance of understanding others and my surroundings. That with this knowledge I can learn to help myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can still remember the lesson on the importance of knowing your own abilities and having confidence in them and yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There was that lesson with the dice, about appreciating the unknown, and respecting it as opposed to working against it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I remember learning how important it is to know where you are and where you have been - your history. This helps you to plan out where you are going and to progress.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I already know the importance of seeing that not all paths are easy to walk, but if I stick at things I can succeed. What harms us just makes us stronger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know that it is important to relate to others and that a lot of understanding and experiences can come from that.

sections.title: Leaving the area before finishing the competition
Talking to the Ethereal Being after completing the Woodcutting trial

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Have you learnt anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I went to an area where I had to cut down trees as fast as I could! I had to do it against another man, and he kept asking me questions on what I could achieve.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: And your thoughts on its meaning?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is tricky. I think it was showing the importance of being able to know your own abilities and having confidence in them. You need this to beat opposition in whatever form that

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: might present itself.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: I am very impressed.

sections.title: Trying to jump the hurdle without talking to the Ethereal Expert

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This looks like an interesting island.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Oh it is.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Fancy a race!?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? That's a bit sudden. What kind of race?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: I bet I can beat you to the other end of this island, I'll take the left route and you can take the right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't seem fair - mine's all curvy and yours is straight.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Well, that's life I'm afraid, it's never as easy as you would like, you have to take the path that's dealt!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you insist.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: You'll see, so how about it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Have it your way.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: On your marks!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Get set!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Go !!!

sections.title: Talking to the Ethereal Expert during the race

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Oh, hello? Looks like you'll probably want to start again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Have it your way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You beat me.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Woo hoo! Ha ha! You can try again if you want, but you'll never beat me, I'm far too fast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eat my dust!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're right, I'm far too slow.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: You give up too easily, but have it your way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I won!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Noooo! How could you beat me?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just making the most of the abilities I worked hard to develop. That's all!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: True. A very important thing to remember! Now be gone!

sections.title: Talking to the Ethereal Being after winning the race

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Have you learnt anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found myself on a sort of race course, facing an opponent. He had a straight route to travel, but mine was weaving and littered with obstacles. He had it easy and I seemed to have the hard route. But I still beat

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: him.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: And what lesson do you suppose that teaches?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I had the more difficult path to travel, but I was faster and wanted it more - I hurried through while he just walked. That shows a few things, not all paths are easy to take, but if you want to succeed, and are willing to

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: put in the effort you can come out successful.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Very, very good!

sections.title: Talking to Ethereal Being after finishing the number puzzle

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Have you learnt anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I went to this area where I had to play this strange game involving numbers. I had to understand what this guy was saying, but he was mainly talking in numbers. It was most weird.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: And did you learn anything from this? What do you suppose this part of your dream was trying to tell you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To me it was about trying to understand someone else to proceed I suppose.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Exactly. By understanding others around you and through communication with your surroundings you can in turn learn a great deal about yourself.

lines.text: Yep, you've got it!

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Ethereal Mimic

sections.title: Talking to the Ethereal Being after finishing the emote challenge

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Have you learnt anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found myself meeting a man that only seemed to interact using body language. I basically mimicked what he was doing and before I knew what was happening, it felt like we were friends. It was very strange.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: That's dreams for you. But there must have been some logic behind it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I think it was illustrating the importance of being able to relate to others, and that a great deal of thoughts and emotions are shared between people. We can learn a lot from each other, so I suppose friend

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: relations are important.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: That seems about right to me.

lines.text: Look around and you'll see a selection of dice. I will call out a number. You must then roll over the dice to get the top faces adding up to create that number. For example. If I said '15', you'd have to turn over the dice

lines.speaker: Ethereal Fluke
lines.text: to get the following numbers at the top: 6 + 4 + 2 + 1 + 1 + 1 = 15. There are of course many ways to get the number 15, but the dice are perhaps not all that random!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Fluke
lines.text: reason.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. Thanks!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Fluke

sections.title: Talking to the Ethereal Being after finishing the dice puzzle

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Have you learnt anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I visited this strange platform covered in dice. I was then challenged to turn over selected dice in what seemed like a game of chance. But I think there was some logic behind it all.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: What do you suppose that means then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it! You have to appreciate that there is always a certain level of the unknown in life, but there is always an answer, you just have to play the game and have hope that you'll succeed.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Spot on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Guide
lines.text: You know everything is a journey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A journey? Don't talk to me about journeys! I'm surprised I have any feet left with all the walking I have to do!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Guide
lines.text: I know. I know. But at every step, it was important that you knew where you had been, where you were and where you were headed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To be honest, I spend a lot of my time not knowing a single one of those things!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Guide
lines.text: Let's see how you fare in here. Try and get to the other side and you'll see what I mean.

sections.title: Attempting to jump diagonally between clouds
Reaching the end of the path

lines.speaker: Dream guide
lines.text: Well done! So tell me, what have you learned?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I understand better now, it is very useful to be able to remember where you have been, where you are and where you are headed. I needed all three to progress, unless I worked with trial and error, which

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: you do sometimes have to do I suppose when looking into the future as the future is undecided.

lines.speaker: Dream guide
lines.text: Very deep! Excellent, I'm glad you learnt something. I shall send you back!

sections.title: Talking to the Ethereal Being after finishing the memory puzzle

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Have you learnt anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I went to this place with loads of platforms. I had to jump across them, but some of them weren't real and I fell away as I stepped on them. I had to remember where I was on the grid, and recall the route I was

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: taking.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Interesting. Do you have any interpretations?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose there is a great deal of importance in knowing where you are and where you are going. Having goals and remembering your past. It helps you make the right decisions!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Bingo!

sections.title: Continued conversation with the Ethereal Being after finishing all the challenges

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: That's it! You've learnt the 6 core lessons: Make sense of others to understand yourself, you must be able to relate to others, you must use your abilities to progress, you must be aware of your past and

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: present to help you in the future, you must harness your confidence, and you must appreciate the unknown.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excellent. Now what?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: There is one more challenge you must face. I can't tell you what to expect, you are still being tested.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Would you like to face your final challenge?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course. I'm ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not ready yet, give me a little more time.

sections.title: Talking to the Ethereal Being after learning about the final challenge

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Hello again. So you have learnt the 6 core lessons: Make sense of others to understand yourself, you must be able to relate to others, you must use your abilities to progress, you must be aware of your past and

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: present to help you in the future, you must harness your confidence, and you must appreciate the unknown. Because magic is within, by understanding these lessons you can access the power of the moon

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: clan. You are almost finished here. There is one more challenge which you must face.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't suppose you can give me any help?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Sorry. So how about it, are you ready?

sections.title: Talking to the Oneiromancer after completing the 6 challenges

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed a few tasks in the dreamland! I've learned a variety of things. But I've still got one last thing to do.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Well best you return and do that before you tell me what you have learned. I'd rather you learn all you can before you talk to me about it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK.

sections.title: Attempting to chop a tree while fighting Me
Random dialogue from Me during the fight

lines.speaker: Me
lines.text: Are you me? Am I you?

sections.title: Dialogue from the player during the fight with Me

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leave me alone... Me...

sections.title: Talking to the Ethereal Being after defeating Me

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did it! I confronted myself!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Being
lines.text: Well done, I think your lesson is complete, best you wake yourself up! Go read the book on the lectern.

sections.title: Talking to the Oneiromancer after defeating Me

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've done it! I understand now!

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: You do, I'm not sure I believe you. Tell me what you've learnt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To start with, six very important things that I needed to know of myself: Make sense of others to understand yourself, you must be able to relate to others, you must use your abilities to progress, you must be aware of

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: your past and present to help you in the future, you must harness your confidence, and you must appreciate the unknown.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: That's great! I would never have imagined someone from mainland could have had such an open mind to learn such things! I shall spread the word among our people. After this I can't see why we can't start to get

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: along.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excellent. I think if you make contact with the Fremennik, and tell them your willingness to communicate and share, you'll find plenty of eager ears.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Well done! You must be rewarded for this great deed. You're now more than welcome to use the altar behind me to craft the astral runes that we use here on the island. These runes will allow you to use a new set of

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: spells. Simply pray at the altar behind me to gain the knowledge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

sections.title: Talking to the Oneiromancer after the quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, how are things going?

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Well hopefully a lot better now that you've initiated the calm between the Moon Clan and the Fremenniks. Remember, if you want to use our Lunar Spells at any time, pray at the altar beside me and you can modify

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: your knowledge!

sections.title: Talking to Brundt the Chieftain after the quest

lines.speaker: Brundt the Chieftain
lines.text: Well if it isn't [Fremennik name]. I've heard of your exploits in the Lunar Isles!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Already? News really does travel fast!

lines.speaker: Brundt the Chieftain
lines.text: Thank you so very much, I think we can really make progress now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No worries. I am pleased I could help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, erm, could you help me out with a Seal of Passage?

lines.speaker: Brundt the Chieftain
lines.text: Seal of Passage, well I suppose so.

lines.speaker: Brundt the Chieftain
lines.text: Ok, here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!
